title: Arirang World Tour — Tokyo Dome Night 1 Features Five Live Tour Debuts Including 'Save Me' and 'Crystal Snow'
detail: BTS performs the first of two sold-out nights at Tokyo Dome on April 17, 2026 (doors 4:30 PM / show 6:30 PM JST) — their first concerts in Japan in approximately seven years. The 360-degree in-the-round stage fills the 55,000-capacity venue. Night 1 features five live tour debuts in the encore: 'Save Me,' 'Crystal Snow' (first performance since 2018), 'Butter,' 'Dynamite,' 'Please,' and 'Into the Sun.' The main setlist includes 'Hooligan,' 'Aliens,' 'Run BTS' (remix), 'FAKE LOVE' (Rockin' Vibe mix), 'SWIM,' '2.0,' 'NORMAL,' 'MIC Drop' (Steve Aoki remix), 'IDOL' (Stadium remix), and 'Come Over.' Fan support campaigns for Jimin and V are visible throughout Tokyo, including digital billboards at Shinjuku and Shibuya. Starnews Korea covers devoted ARMY presence and member fan cheers outside the venue.

media.caption: BTS Tokyo Dome Night 1 — ARMY fans cheer as BTS returns to Japan for first concerts in ~7 years
